# Exocortex — Persistent Memory System for AI Agents

> Long-term memory with semantic search, knowledge graphs, temporal reasoning, and self-improving retrieval. Give your agent a brain that persists across sessions.

## Base URL
REST: http://localhost:4010
MCP: stdio transport via `npx exocortex-mcp`

## Authentication
Bearer token or X-Exocortex-Token header. Optional — if no token configured, all requests allowed.

## MCP Tools (17 total)

### Core Memory
- `memory_store` — Store a new memory with content, tags, importance, tier, namespace
- `memory_search` — Hybrid search (semantic + keyword + graph). Supports expanded_query, filters, compact mode
- `memory_get` — Fetch full content for specific memory IDs
- `memory_update` — Update memory content, tags, importance, metadata
- `memory_forget` — Deactivate a memory (soft delete)
- `memory_browse` — Browse memories with pagination and filters
- `memory_context` — Load broad context for a topic (session start, subject switching). Optional deep mode with LLM follow-ups
- `memory_facts` — Extract and list key facts from stored memories

### Knowledge Graph
- `memory_entities` — List entities (people, projects, technologies) with types and connections
- `memory_graph` — Get entity relationship graph with centrality and communities
- `memory_link` — Create explicit links between related memories

### Intelligence
- `memory_project_snapshot` — Load project context: goals, decisions, open threads, techniques
- `memory_diff` — Compare memory state between two time periods
- `memory_contradictions` — Detect contradictory facts in stored memories
- `memory_timeline` — Chronological trace of a topic's evolution

### Maintenance
- `memory_maintenance` — Run maintenance tasks (consolidation, decay, reembedding, weight tuning)
- `memory_ping` — Health check and uptime

### Ingestion
- `memory_ingest` — Ingest documents (files, URLs) with chunking and overlap
- `memory_research` — Multi-source web research with automatic storage

### Goals & Predictions
- `goal` — Create, update, list goals with milestones and progress tracking
- `prediction` — Create, resolve, and calibrate predictions

## REST API Endpoints

### Memories
POST   /api/memories          — Create memory
GET    /api/memories          — List memories (paginated)
GET    /api/memories/:id      — Get single memory
PATCH  /api/memories/:id      — Update memory
DELETE /api/memories/:id      — Delete memory
POST   /api/memories/search   — Search memories

### Entities & Graph
GET    /api/entities              — List entities
GET    /api/entities/graph        — Entity relationship graph
GET    /api/entities/graph/analysis — Graph analytics (centrality, communities)

### Intelligence
POST   /api/consolidate           — Trigger memory consolidation
GET    /api/consolidations        — List consolidation history
POST   /api/contradictions/detect — Detect contradictions
GET    /api/contradictions        — List contradictions

### Goals & Predictions
GET/POST /api/goals               — CRUD for goals
GET/POST /api/predictions         — CRUD for predictions

### Analytics
GET    /api/analytics/summary         — Memory stats overview
GET    /api/analytics/tag-effectiveness — Tag usage analytics
GET    /api/retrieval/stats           — Search hit rate and quality metrics

## Memory Tiers
- `working` — 24h auto-expire, excluded from general search
- `episodic` — Default tier, medium-term
- `semantic` — Permanent facts, exempt from decay
- `procedural` — Permanent techniques/skills
- `reference` — Permanent documents/references

## Key Concepts
- **Hybrid search**: Vector similarity + full-text search + graph proximity + recency + usefulness scoring
- **Reciprocal Rank Fusion**: Combines vector and FTS results for better recall
- **Adaptive weights**: Scoring weights auto-tune based on retrieval feedback
- **Entity extraction**: Automatic extraction of people, projects, technologies from stored content
- **Consolidation**: Similar memories auto-merged into summaries, originals archived
- **Temporal reasoning**: Track how topics evolve over time, supersession chains
